title: HR can log in and reach the HR dashboard
description: Verifies an HR user can sign in and is redirected into the HR dashboard experience successfully.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the HR dashboard

title: Redirect unauthenticated users away from HR dashboard
description: This test verifies an unauthenticated user cannot access the HR dashboard and is redirected to the login page.

steps.description: Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: HR can review a claim and update its decision status with an HR note
description: Verifies HR can open a claim from Requires Attention, submit an approval or rejection with an HR note, and see the decision reflected back on the dashboard.

steps.description: Switch to the Requires Attention bucket
Open the first claim from the list
Choose a decision action for the claim
Fill a short note into the HR note field
Click to return to the dashboard
Verify the claim is no longer in the original bucket or shows an updated status in the list

title: Unauthenticated user cannot access HR dashboard route
description: Verifies a logged-out user who navigates to the HR dashboard is blocked and is sent to authenticate.

steps.description: Verify the user is prompted to authenticate
Verify the user does not see the HR dashboard content

title: Allow HR to log in and reach the HR dashboard
description: This test verifies an HR user can log in successfully and land on the HR dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the HR dashboard

title: Block unauthenticated access to HR policy studio
description: This test verifies an unauthenticated user cannot access the HR policy studio and is redirected to the login page.

steps.description: Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: Employee is blocked from HR-only routes
description: Verifies an authenticated Employee cannot access HR-only pages and is blocked from viewing HR content.

steps.description: Click to navigate to an HR-only page from the address bar by navigating to /hr/dashboard
Verify access is denied for the HR-only page
Verify HR dashboard content is not shown

title: Unauthenticated user cannot view HR claims triage dashboard
description: Verifies a logged-out user cannot access the HR claims triage page content.

steps.description: Verify the user is prompted to authenticate
Verify claims triage content is not visible

title: Employee can log in and reach the Employee submit area
description: Verifies an Employee user can sign in and is redirected into the Employee submission experience successfully.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the employee submit page

title: HR can triage claims by switching buckets and opening a claim
description: Verifies the HR dashboard allows switching between triage buckets and opening a claim to view details.

steps.description: Switch to the Requires Attention bucket
Open the first claim from the list
Verify the claim detail view is displayed

title: Authenticated HR session persists across reload to protected page
description: Verifies an HR user remains logged in after a page reload and can still access a protected HR route.

steps.description: Verify the user still sees the HR dashboard content

title: HR can upload a valid policy document and see it in the policy list
description: Verifies an HR user can create a new policy with a valid document upload and the policy appears in the library list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the policy studio
Fill Policy Alpha into the policy name field
Fill Finance into the department field
Upload a valid PDF or DOCX policy document under 10MB
Verify the new policy appears in the policies list

title: Employee cannot access the HR policy studio
description: Verifies an authenticated Employee is blocked from viewing the HR Policy Studio page.

steps.description: Verify access is denied for the HR-only page
Verify policy studio content is not shown

title: Invalid login is blocked
description: Verifies a user cannot log in with invalid credentials and remains unauthenticated.

steps.description: Fill invalid-user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Verify a login error is visible
Verify the user is not logged in

title: Allow HR to log out and lose access to protected HR routes
description: This test verifies logging out clears the session such that protected HR routes redirect back to login.

steps.description: Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: Invalid credentials are rejected with a visible error
description: Verifies a user entering invalid credentials cannot log in and sees an authentication error state.

steps.description: Fill invalid.user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Verify a login error message is visible

title: HR can log out and is prevented from returning to protected routes
description: Verifies logging out ends the session and prevents access to protected HR pages.

steps.description: Verify the user is prompted to authenticate

title: HR can delete a policy and it is removed from the list
description: Verifies an HR user can delete an existing policy and it no longer appears in the policy library list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the policy studio
Fill Policy To Delete into the policy name field
Fill Operations into the department field
Upload a valid PDF or DOCX policy document under 10MB
Search policies by name using Policy To Delete
Open the policy from the list
Confirm the deletion in the confirmation modal
Verify the deleted policy no longer appears in the policies list

title: Delete a policy and confirm it is removed from the list
description: This test verifies an HR user can delete a policy and it no longer appears in the policy list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the policy studio
Select a valid PDF or DOCX file under the size limit for upload
Delete the newly uploaded policy from the policies list
Verify the deleted policy no longer appears in the policies list

title: Employee opens a reimbursement to view full chain-of-evidence
description: Verifies an employee can open a reimbursement from their history and see chain-of-evidence details such as extraction/verdicts and audit information.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the employee history page
If any reimbursement is listed, click the first reimbursement row to open its detail view
Verify the reimbursement detail view shows chain-of-evidence information such as extraction/verdicts and an audit or change history section

title: HR review detail shows AI evidence and audit trail information
description: Verifies the HR claim review page displays AI judgment, confidence, and evidence/audit information needed for compliance review.

steps.description: Switch to the Requires Attention bucket
Open the first claim from the list
Verify AI verdicts, confidence, and policy citation evidence are displayed
Verify an audit trail or change summary section is displayed

title: HR can use dashboard filters to refine the claims list
description: Verifies HR can apply filters (such as AI status, category, or amount range) and see the list reflect the filter criteria.

steps.description: Select a valid AI status filter option
Verify the claims list reflects the applied filters

title: Reject oversized policy file before upload
description: This test verifies the policy uploader prevents uploading an oversized file and shows a size validation message.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the policy studio
Select an oversized policy file for upload
Verify a file size validation error is visible

title: Employee views own reimbursement history list
description: Verifies an authenticated employee can open their history page and see a list of their own reimbursement records (or a clear empty state) without errors.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the employee history page
Verify the employee reimbursement history view displays either a list of reimbursements or an empty state message

title: Show error feedback on invalid credentials
description: This test verifies that submitting the login form with incorrect credentials shows a visible login failure message and does not authenticate the user.

steps.description: Fill invalid.user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Verify a login error banner is visible

title: HR can view the policy processing state after upload
description: Verifies that after saving a new uploaded policy, the UI shows a processing state before returning to the policy library.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the policy studio
Fill Policy Processing Check into the policy name field
Fill Legal into the department field
Upload a valid PDF or DOCX policy document under 10MB
Verify a processing progress view is displayed

title: HR can open a passed-review claim in read-only mode
description: Verifies an HR user can navigate from an HR claim list into a read-only claim view and see evidence and decision details.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the HR dashboard
If a passed-review or approved bucket/list is available, open the first claim in that bucket in the read-only view
Verify the HR claim read-only view displays the claim’s evidence and decision details

title: HR can search claims in the dashboard list
description: Verifies HR can enter a search query to narrow the visible claims list.

steps.description: Fill a valid search query into the claims search field
Verify the claims list updates to show only matching results or an empty state

title: Reject unsupported policy file type before upload
description: This test verifies the policy uploader prevents selecting an unsupported file type and shows a validation message without starting an upload.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the policy studio
Select an unsupported file type for the policy upload input
Verify a file type validation error is visible

title: Unsupported policy file type shows an upload error
description: Verifies that uploading a policy document with an unsupported file type is blocked with a visible upload error state.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the policy studio
Fill Policy Unsupported Type into the policy name field
Fill HR into the department field
Upload an unsupported file type as the policy document
Verify an upload error banner is visible

title: Login form validation prevents submission with missing required fields
description: Verifies the login form blocks submission when required fields are empty and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Verify a required-field validation error is visible
Verify the user is not logged in

title: Demo login enters an authenticated session and routes correctly
description: Verifies the demo-login shortcut signs a user in and routes them to the correct portal landing page.

steps.description: Use the HR demo login option
Verify the user lands on the HR dashboard

title: HR can open the full pending requests list from the dashboard
description: Verifies HR can open the full list of pending requests from the dashboard and view it in the intended UI.

steps.description: Click the control to view all pending requests
Verify the full pending requests list is displayed

title: HR can filter and search policies in the policy library
description: Verifies an HR user can use status filters and search to narrow the policy list results.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the policy studio
Select a policy status filter option
Fill Policy into the search field
Verify the policies list updates to show only matching results

title: Block login when email format is invalid
description: This test verifies the user cannot submit the login form with an invalid email format and sees an inline validation error.

steps.description: Fill invalid-email into the email field
Fill valid-password into the password field
Verify an email format validation error is visible

title: HR sees validation feedback when uploading an unsupported policy file type
description: Verifies the policy uploader prevents or rejects unsupported file types and shows a clear validation error to the user.

steps.description: Click to open the HR policy studio from the app navigation
Attempt to upload a file with an unsupported type
Verify an upload validation error is visible
Verify no new policy is added to the policy list

title: Client-side validation blocks submitting empty login fields
description: Verifies the login form prevents submission when required fields are empty and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Verify required-field validation errors are visible

title: Block login when email is missing
description: This test verifies the user cannot submit the login form with an empty email and sees an inline validation error.

steps.description: Fill valid-password into the password field
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Block login when password is missing
description: This test verifies the user cannot submit the login form with an empty password and sees an inline validation error.

steps.description: Fill user@example.com into the email field
Verify a password validation error is visible

title: Employee submit page renders and allows logout despite placeholder state
description: Verifies an authenticated Employee can reach the submit page and use logout even when the receipt upload form is not implemented.
category: WF2 - Employee Receipt Upload & OCR Extraction

steps.description: Click to open the employee submit page from the app navigation
Verify the user is prompted to authenticate

title: HR cannot use History page for full claim browsing in MVP
description: Verifies the HR history page shows the MVP restriction state instead of an interactive history workflow.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the HR history page
Verify an MVP restriction message is visible and interactive history browsing is not available

title: Forgot password shows MVP restriction feedback
description: Verifies that using the forgot-password entry point shows a visible MVP restriction message rather than a reset flow.

steps.description: Verify a restriction toast or banner is visible
